name: Chicken & Dumplings (Broaddus)
recipeInstructions:
Directions for Chicken and Dumplings: Dissect the chicken and remove the skin; place in a large pan. Add water, salt, celery, and onion; simmer 1 to 2 hours or until meat is tender. Remove chicken from bones; return chicken to the chicken stock. Bring chicken and stock to a boil; add rolled dumplings. Cover and cook gently for 8 to 10 minutes.
Directions for making rolled dumplings: Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add milk to form a stiff dough. Roll the dough out to about 1/8 inch thickness and cut into 1-inch strips, squares, or diamonds.
